name: Goblin Scout
rules: Haste. When this enters the battlefield: draw a card if an opponent controls a creature.

name: Forest Wolf
rules: When this enters: reveal the top card of your library. If it is a beast, put it into your hand.

name: Ancient Oak Warden
rules: Vigilance. Other allies you control get +1/+1. Pay 2: regenerate this.

name: Phoenix of the Ember Peaks
rules: Flying, haste. If this would be destroyed, exile it instead. At the start of your next upkeep, return it to the battlefield.
